content:
# Apple Human Interface Guidelines - Overview

Page type: mobile_app_screen
Use cases: consumer app, premium product, mobile utility, settings page
Evidence: direct_spec / high
Source: https://developer.apple.com/design/human-interface-guidelines/

Visual traits:
- restraint
- clarity
- depth
- strong typography
- generous spacing

Use when:
- consumer app
- premium product
- mobile utility
- settings page

Avoid when:
- dense enterprise data tables
- maximalist campaign pages
- game UI

AI summary: Use Apple HIG-inspired polish for premium native-feeling UI: clarity, hierarchy, restraint, readable typography, generous spacing, and familiar platform controls.

# Apple Human Interface Guidelines - Layout Rules

Page type: mobile_app_screen
Use cases: consumer app, premium product, mobile utility, settings page
Evidence: direct_spec / high
Source: https://developer.apple.com/design/human-interface-guidelines/

- Prioritize content hierarchy before decoration.
- Use spacing, typography, and alignment to create perceived quality.
- Keep controls familiar to the platform when designing native-feeling screens.

AI summary: Use Apple HIG-inspired polish for premium native-feeling UI: clarity, hierarchy, restraint, readable typography, generous spacing, and familiar platform controls.

# Apple Human Interface Guidelines - Component Patterns

Page type: mobile_app_screen
Use cases: consumer app, premium product, mobile utility, settings page
Evidence: direct_spec / high
Source: https://developer.apple.com/design/human-interface-guidelines/

- navigation
- lists
- forms
- sheets
- toolbars
- feedback

AI summary: Use Apple HIG-inspired polish for premium native-feeling UI: clarity, hierarchy, restraint, readable typography, generous spacing, and familiar platform controls.

# Apple Human Interface Guidelines - Interaction States

Page type: mobile_app_screen
Use cases: consumer app, premium product, mobile utility, settings page
Evidence: direct_spec / high
Source: https://developer.apple.com/design/human-interface-guidelines/

- focus
- selection
- disabled
- modal presentation
- system feedback

AI summary: Use Apple HIG-inspired polish for premium native-feeling UI: clarity, hierarchy, restraint, readable typography, generous spacing, and familiar platform controls.

# Apple Human Interface Guidelines - Accessibility Notes

Page type: mobile_app_screen
Use cases: consumer app, premium product, mobile utility, settings page
Evidence: direct_spec / high
Source: https://developer.apple.com/design/human-interface-guidelines/

- Respect readable text sizes and contrast.
- Design controls with clear hit areas and platform-consistent behavior.

AI summary: Use Apple HIG-inspired polish for premium native-feeling UI: clarity, hierarchy, restraint, readable typography, generous spacing, and familiar platform controls.

# Apple Human Interface Guidelines - Implementation Hints

Page type: mobile_app_screen
Use cases: consumer app, premium product, mobile utility, settings page
Evidence: direct_spec / high
Source: https://developer.apple.com/design/human-interface-guidelines/

- Use when the user asks for polished, premium, simple, or native-feeling UI.
- Prefer fewer elements with stronger hierarchy instead of dense decoration.

AI summary: Use Apple HIG-inspired polish for premium native-feeling UI: clarity, hierarchy, restraint, readable typography, generous spacing, and familiar platform controls.
